canonical_rule: Apply precedence ladder exactly; AGENT_RULES first, then infra/system plan specializations, then results/run/structure/artifacts, then prompt-exclude list
practical_prompt_implication: State precedence explicitly in non-trivial prompts
risk_if_ignored: Conflicting instructions selected from lower-priority docs

canonical_rule: Single canonical run root, single manifest system, single fingerprint story, wrapper entrypoint, no parallel infra systems
practical_prompt_implication: For infra tasks, cite this doc as tie-breaker for run roots/manifests/entrypoints

canonical_rule: Execution trust != system trust != isolation trust; cross-module law is normative; phase gates control closure claims
practical_prompt_implication: Avoid broad closure language in prompts; specify trust domain

canonical_rule: Write outputs under results/<experiment>/runs/run_<timestamp>_<label>/
practical_prompt_implication: Require run-scoped outputs and prohibit module/root sinks for generated run artifacts

canonical_rule: run_manifest.json at run root, fixed execution_status.csv schema, run_dir-only identity, no root pointer
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should demand run-root manifest + execution status and schema consistency

canonical_rule: Current vs target structure differ; do not auto-migrate; versioned folders not auto-legacy
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should name exact current paths and avoid structural refactor unless requested

canonical_rule: Use figures/tables/reports/review only; observables.csv stays at run root
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should include artifact directory rules and observables exception

canonical_rule: Do not bulk-load excluded docs unless task explicitly names them
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should include minimal doc set and exclusion reminder

canonical_rule: Contracts are authoritative; reports are evidence/history only
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should separate normative contracts from reports
risk_if_ignored: Reports treated as source of truth

canonical_rule: Validation -> IO -> Pipeline; no enforcement inside IO layer
practical_prompt_implication: When data-loading behavior matters, prompt should preserve layer separation

canonical_rule: Single canonical pipeline with channel-aware behavior and S_canonical boundary rules
practical_prompt_implication: Switching prompts should pin canonical pipeline and forbid local-only downstream identity

canonical_rule: Single-pipeline interpretation locked; multi-pipeline rejected in current scope
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should avoid framing channels as separate canonical pipelines

canonical_rule: File marked DEPRECATED and not canonical authority
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should avoid using this doc as primary source

canonical_rule: Repository-fact survey plus append-only updates; historical context retained
practical_prompt_implication: Use carefully as factual/historical context, not sole normative source
risk_if_ignored: Mixing historical flags with current canonical authority

canonical_rule: Read minimal context first; wrapper and output boundaries; avoid excluded docs
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should reference minimal context for infra/execution tasks

canonical_rule: Synthesizes docs with implementation and highlights known tensions
practical_prompt_implication: Use as secondary synthesis, not precedence override

canonical_rule: execution_status.csv has exact 5-column canonical schema
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should require schema/order explicitly when run outputs are checked

canonical_rule: Run prompt should include run_dir, execution status outcome, failure class reporting
practical_prompt_implication: Use as concise run-task scaffolding

canonical_rule: Audit prompts should limit scope to run artifacts and log soft issues
practical_prompt_implication: Use for read-only or audit-style runs

canonical_rule: Fix prompts should keep scope tight and log verification
practical_prompt_implication: Use for constrained infra/doc fixes

canonical_rule: Plan prompts should include objective/files/parallelism/observability
practical_prompt_implication: Use for multi-step tasks where planning clarity matters

canonical_rule: Registry is authoritative for module classification and active structure
practical_prompt_implication: Prompt should align module naming/scope to registry
risk_if_ignored: Module scope mismatch in outputs or claims
